mapper.select: select * from testinfotable, testtable where testinfotable.test_id = testtable.test_id
select * from reginfotable, testinfo__room where reginfotable.testinfo__room_id = testinfo__room.testinfo__room_id and testinfo_id = #{testinfo_id}

select * from testinfo__room, roomtable, testinfotable, testtable where testinfo__room.room_id = roomtable.room_id and testinfo__room.testinfo_id = testinfotable.testinfo_id and testinfotable.test_id = testtable.test_id and testinfotable.testinfo_id = #{testinfo_id}

select * from testinfo__room, roomtable, testinfotable, testtable where testinfo__room.room_id = roomtable.room_id and testinfo__room.testinfo_id = testinfotable.testinfo_id and testinfotable.test_id = testtable.test_id and testinfo__room.testinfo__room_id=#{testinfo__room_id}

select * from reginfotable, roomtable, testinfotable, testtable, testinfo__room where reginfotable.testinfo__room_id = testinfo__room.testinfo__room_id and testinfo__room.room_id = roomtable.room_id and testinfo__room.testinfo_id = testinfotable.testinfo_id and testinfotable.test_id = testtable.test_id and reginfotable.user_id = #{user_id} and testinfo__room.testinfo_id = #{testinfo_id}

select * from reginfotable, roomtable, testinfotable, testtable, testinfo__room where reginfotable.testinfo__room_id = testinfo__room.testinfo__room_id and testinfo__room.room_id = roomtable.room_id and testinfo__room.testinfo_id = testinfotable.testinfo_id and testinfotable.test_id = testtable.test_id and reginfotable.reginfo_id = #{reginfo_id}
mapper.update:
update reginfotable
user_id = #{user_id},
testinfo__room_id = #{testinfo__room_id},
ticketnum = #{ticketnum},
status = #{status},
where reginfo_id = #{reginfo_id}
mapper.select: select * from reginfotable, roomtable, testinfotable, testtable, testinfo__room where reginfotable.testinfo__room_id = testinfo__room.testinfo__room_id and testinfo__room.room_id = roomtable.room_id and testinfo__room.testinfo_id = testinfotable.testinfo_id and testinfotable.test_id = testtable.test_id and reginfotable.user_id = #{user_id}
